title: Bloomberg: Trump’s Green-Card Crackdown Sparks Outcry From Confused Lawyers | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

## Bloomberg: Trump’s Green-Card Crackdown Sparks Outcry From Confused Lawyers

In an article published in Bloomberg , Partner Bo Cooper comments on the questions raised by recent changes to green card processing and what they could mean for foreign nationals pursuing permanent residence. He also emphasized the importance, under the new policy, of affirmatively demonstrating to the government why an applicant should be granted a green card without the disruption of having to leave the United States.
